title: chamomilla suaveolens
intro: Chamomilla suaveolens, also known as Whorled Chamomile, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Whorled Chamomile include relieving menstrual cramps, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and anxiety. Whorled Chamomile can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally as a skin toner or added to bathwater for a calming soak.
